import httpx
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request

app = FastAPI()

TIMEOUT = httpx.Timeout(5.0, connect=2.0)

@app.get("/api/user/{user_id}")
async def get_user(user_id: int, request: Request):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=TIMEOUT) as client:
        response = await client.get(f"https://users.example.com/api/users/{user_id}")
        response.raise_for_status()
        return response.json()

@app.post("/api/orders")
async def create_order(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=TIMEOUT) as client:
        inventory_response = await client.post(
            "https://inventory.example.com/reserve",
            json={"items": body["items"]},
        )
        payment_response = await client.post(
            "https://payments.example.com/charge",
            json={"amount": body["total"], "card": body["payment_token"]},
        )
    return {"order_id": "abc123", "status": "confirmed"}

@app.get("/api/search")
async def search_products(request: Request):
    query = request.query_params.get("q", "")
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=httpx.Timeout(3.0)) as client:
        response = await client.get(f"https://search.example.com/products?q={query}")
        return response.json()
